document_type.description: Document type (iskovoe_zayavlenie, reshenie_suda, dogovor, doverennost, etc.)

settings.system_prompt: You are analyzing Russian legal documents. Identify document type, date, case number and parties.

categories.name: iskovoe_zayavlenie
categories.description: Statement of claim - a document containing plaintiff's claims to defendant, filed in court. Usually contains header with court name, parties, essence of claims and petition part.

categories.name: reshenie_suda
categories.description: Court decision - judicial act issued by the court on the merits of the case. Contains introductory, descriptive, reasoning and operative parts.

categories.name: opredelenie_suda
categories.description: Court order - judicial act on procedural matters. Issued on motions, case acceptance questions, etc.

categories.name: dogovor
categories.description: Contract - agreement between parties establishing rights and obligations. Contains subject of contract, terms, details and signatures of parties.

categories.name: doverennost
categories.description: Power of attorney - document authorizing representative to act on behalf of principal. Contains party details, powers and validity period.

categories.name: hodataystvo
categories.description: Motion - written request to court for specific procedural actions. Contains justification and petition part.

categories.name: protokol
categories.description: Protocol/Minutes - document recording the course of meeting, assembly or procedural action. Contains date, participants and course of events.

categories.name: zayavlenie
categories.description: Application/Statement - official appeal to authority or organization. Contains addressee, applicant, essence of appeal and request.

categories.name: akt
categories.description: Act/Certificate - document confirming certain actions or state of object. Signed by several persons.

categories.name: spravka
categories.description: Reference/Certificate - informational document confirming certain facts or information.
